The AI Platform for Availability Optimization

# Predictive. Autonomous.    Always Available.

Pull Logic uses multi-agent AI to anticipate demand shifts and supply risk, then acts ahead of disruption to keep the right products available, where and when customers need them.

[How it works](https://pulllogic.com/solutions/)

[Book a demo](https://pulllogic.com/contact/)

#### Trusted by global leaders

## Availability Optimization, End to End

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20295%20184'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

#### Predict Lost Sales Before They Happen

Continuously detect demand shifts, supply risk, and substitution gaps across your network, so you can fix problems before they turn into missed revenue.

[Learn more](https://pulllogic.com/solutions/)

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20295%20184'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

#### Drive Every Decision With PAR

PAR (Product Availability Readiness) shows where you are exposed, what to stock, where to position it, and in what quantity. Finally manage availability, not just inventory.

[Learn more](https://pulllogic.com/solutions/)

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20295%20185'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

#### Move From Insights To Autonomous Action

AI agents execute replenishment, substitutions, and exception handling in a closed loop, eliminating constant firefighting.

[Learn more](https://pulllogic.com/solutions/)

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20295%20189'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

#### Test Every Decision Before You Commit

Simulate today’s process against AI-driven alternatives to compare service, inventory, and revenue impact before making real-world changes.

[Learn more](https://pulllogic.com/solutions/)

## A New Class of Supply Chain KPIs, From Georgia Tech

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20280%20280'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Built on breakthrough research from Georgia Tech, Pull Logic introduces a new class of supply chain KPIs. Product Availability Readiness (PAR) and Robust Autonomy Period (RAP) replace backward-looking metrics with forward-looking measures of risk, readiness, and revenue protection.

Why this matters:

- **Traditional service metrics** tell you how you performed yesterday
- **Days of stock** gives a static and incomplete picture
- **PAR and RAP** show whether you are truly ready for what’s coming next

### Product Availability Readiness (PAR)

A forward-looking score that shows how much of your future demand you are actually ready to serve.

#### Prevent lost sales before they happen

#### Protect revenue when SKUs are unavailable

#### Spot availability gaps   early

#### A KPI that looks forward, not backward

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20428%20255'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

### Robust Autonomy Period (RAP)

How long your network can run autonomously before service or revenue is at risk.

#### Autonomy by SKU   and node

#### Clear visibility into vulnerabilities

#### Less unproductive   inventory

#### Higher resilience during disruptions

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20582%20384'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

## Trusted by Global Leaders

From manufacturers to distributors Pull Logic helps teams cut lost sales, reduce unproductive inventory, and protect growth.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Pull Logic has helped us identify availability gaps earlier and make better decisions around inventory and service levels. The insights are directly influencing how we run the business.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2070%2070'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

**Keith Wainwright** Director, TYM Tractors

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Pull Logic eliminated guesswork from our inventory and dealer planning. We forecast better, position inventory where it matters, and respond faster to demand.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2070%2070'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

**Jeff Albright** President, YANMAR America

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Pull Logic has helped us identify availability gaps earlier and make better decisions around inventory and service levels. The insights are directly influencing how we run the business.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2070%2070'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

**Keith Wainwright** Director, TYM Tractors

## What Makes Pull Logic Different?

Pull Logic is not a reporting layer. It is an AI decision and execution engine that senses risk, decides what to do, and acts across your supply chain.

Lost Sales & True Demand
Substitution Intelligence
Agentic AI Execution
Fast, ERP-Agnostic Deployment

## Uncover True Demand and Lost Sales

See the demand you are missing, not just what you shipped. Pull Logic identifies lost sales, substitution behavior, and wait patterns so you can recover hidden revenue and plan against real demand.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20601%20481'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

## Smart Substitution, Powered by SKU Intelligence

Pull Logic plans substitution ahead of time, not after stockouts happen. It understands which products customers will accept as alternatives and uses that intelligence to shape assortment, inventory, and replenishment before demand hits.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20449%20428'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

## Powered by Agentic AI

Pull Logic doesn’t just analyze your supply chain. It runs it. Specialized AI agents continuously sense risk, decide what to do, and execute actions across inventory, assortment, and deployment to keep availability high and waste low.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20527%20253'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

## Fast, ERP-Agnostic

Go live in 4–6 weeks without changing your ERP. Pull Logic sits on top of your existing systems and starts delivering measurable ROI in the same quarter.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20420%20351'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

## See the Business Impact of Pull Logic

AI-powered supply chain intelligence that delivers rapid, measurable results.

0%

### Product Availability

Right products, right place, right time.

Upto

0%

### Reduction in Unproductive Inventory

Capital freed by reducing overstock and dead stock.

0%

### Faster Shipping Times

Inventory positioned closer to demand.

+

0%

### Recovery of Lost Sales

Demand captured that would otherwise be missed.

3x

### ROI Within the First Year

Based on customer results and pilots.

Results vary by customer, data quality, and deployment scope.

## The Pull Logic Platform

An AI platform for availability that protects revenue and eliminates unproductive inventory.

## The Availability Intelligence Platform

Pull Logic is the system of record for availability. It brings together demand sensing, PAR/RAP, substitution intelligence, and autonomous execution to keep products available, protect revenue, and eliminate unproductive inventory.

[Explore the Platform](https://pulllogic.com/verticals/#case-study)

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

## Digital Twin for Enterprise Decision-Making

Simulate your network before you act. Compare scenarios, understand trade-offs, and make decisions that protect service, inventory, and revenue.

[Explore Digital Twin](https://pulllogic.com/verticals/#case-study)

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

## AI Agents That Run the Workflow

Pull Logic’s AI agents automate planning and execution, turning signals into action so teams stop firefighting and start operating ahead of change.

[Explore AI Agents](https://pulllogic.com/verticals/#case-study)

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](https://pulllogic.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/white_logo.svg)

## Always Ready. Always Available.

AI-driven Availability Intelligence for modern supply chains.

Pull Logic helps enterprises protect availability, capture more demand, and eliminate unproductive inventory across their network.

[Book a demo](https://pulllogic.com/contact/)

## Jeff Albright, CEO of a Global Equipment Manufacturer Talks About Pull Logic

**Jeff Albright**, a seasoned leader in the global equipment industry, shares his experience of working with Pull Logic to solve critical inventory challenges. Faced with inefficiencies and outdated processes, Jeff turned to Pull Logic’s advanced predictive tools, like the Product Availability Ratio (PAR), to optimize dealer inventory, reduce excess stock, and improve product availability. By replacing guesswork with data-driven insights, Pull Logic helped streamline operations and enhance profitability across his dealer network.

metadata.ogDescription: AI-driven inventory and supply chain platform that predicts demand, optimizes product availability, reduces lost sales, and boosts profitability with advanced analytics.

data.summary: Pull Logic has raised $3.3 million in funding to enhance its Availability Intelligence platform, which employs multi-agent AI to optimize supply chain efficiency by predicting demand changes and minimizing supply risks. Key innovations include the Product Availability Readiness (PAR) and Robust Autonomy Period (RAP) metrics, which shift focus from historical performance to proactive measures, aiming to reduce lost sales and enhance inventory management. The platform offers autonomous actions through AI agents, enabling rapid response to market fluctuations and substantial recovery of lost sales. This solution is designed to integrate seamlessly with existing ERP systems, aiming for significant ROI within the first year.
